title: elaphoglossum standleyi
intro: Elaphoglossum standleyi, also known as Standley's elaphoglossum, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum standleyi may include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and providing antioxidant properties. Elaphoglossum standleyi can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support overall well-being and address specific health concerns.
